series_title: Initial licensure, renewal, reinstatement applications and Apprentice Registrations
series_description: Applications of all licenses and apprentice registrations issued by the Board. Also includes required documentation, e.g., transcripts, exam scores, and other documents required by rule.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Scanned images to be retained indefinitely in licensing system.

series_description: Annual report submitted electronically to the Governor of Board's official acts during the preceding year.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic annual report permanently. ; Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 4725.07, the destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value.

series_description: Board meeting minutes documenting board actions occurring at public meetings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain indefinitely ; Electronic: Retain indefinitely

series_description: Records of each meeting including names of members present, all business and matters considered and action taken.

Information pertaining to the audit and compliance with the continuing education requirements. This may include correspondence, certified mail receipts, CE tracking forms, proof of continuing education, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Scanned images to be retained indefinitely in licensing system

series_description: This record file contains Enforcement files involving confidential information, including complaints and supplemental material filed with the Board pursuant to ORC 4725; documents relating to the processing of complaints; information relating to investigations, including reports of investigations, correspondence and memoranda, subpoenas, and related documents, orders to evaluation, consent agreements, notices of opportunity for hearing, cautionary letters, skills or knowledge test completed by licensees; federal databank reports; any disciplinary actions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; ; Electronic: Retain indefinitely

series_description: All paper and electronic records related to payroll processing, including payroll register, emails documenting corrections and adjustments and related documents. Data collected from an electronic timekeeping system to establish payable work hours and attendance, e.g. time sheets.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is release and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is release and all discrepancies are resolved.

series_description: Records regarding revenue and expenditures, including deposits to Treasure of State, daily transactions. Inhouse supporting documentation (Electronic logs, EDI, ISTV, memos, etc.)
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is release and all discrepancies are resolved.
